"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const headers = require("./headers.cjs"); const json = require("./json.cjs"); const ssrClient = require("./ssr-client.cjs"); exports.mergeHeaders = headers.mergeHeaders; exports.json = json.json; exports.hydrate = ssrClient.hydrate; //# sourceMappingURL=client.cjs.map
